reason: Online-Mind2Web dataset is gated on HuggingFace. The engineer's env had GOOGLE_GENERATIVE_AI_API_KEY (for the LLM-as-judge) but no HUGGINGFACE_TOKEN (required to download the 300-task JSON the first time). Run the following on a provisioned box to replace this placeholder:
reproduceWith: 2. Create a HuggingFace read token at https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens
6. Copy the evalite scoreboard JSON into this file; replace `status` with "captured"; re-run `pnpm format`.

judgeSmokeResults.label: clean completion (volvo ex90 configurator)
judgeSmokeResults.reasoning: The agent successfully navigated through the specified path (Buy -> Build -> EX90) and reached the final order request form URL as evidenced by the trajectory and final summary.

judgeSmokeResults.label: stopped at landing page
judgeSmokeResults.reasoning: The agent only navigated to the homepage and failed to perform any of the required steps to configure the vehicle or reach the order request form.

judgeSmokeResults.label: malformed tools, no progress
judgeSmokeResults.reasoning: The agent failed to execute any valid tool calls, reached no key nodes, and did not provide a final URL, indicating it never even reached the starting website.

judgeSmokeNote: The judgeSmokeResults block was captured via `packages/evals/scripts/smoke-judge.ts` against real Gemini 3 Flash Preview (model id `gemini-3-flash-preview`) at temperature 0.1. All three synthetic trajectories got the expected verdict. This proves the LLM-as-judge wiring end-to-end; the per-task numbers block above stays empty until a real Mind2Web run lands.
notes: Wave 4.5 is the baseline-diff wave per plan.md:241. That wave will (a) populate the HF cache once, (b) run the real Claude runner, (c) run the Gemma runner, (d) run the same three against the baseline-b1/b2 branches for regression diffing, then commit a `regression-report.md`. Holding this placeholder as a sentinel so the baselines/ directory exists with a known-shape schema.
